query:
SELECT u.name, sl.digestType, sl.weekKey, sl.status, sl.sentDate, sl.sentAt, sl.itemCount, sl.dryRun, sl.error
FROM userEmailSendLog sl
JOIN users u ON u.id = sl.userId
WHERE sl.digestType = 'thursday'
  AND sl.weekKey >= '2026W19'
ORDER BY sl.weekKey DESC, u.name;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
SELECT u.name, sl.digestType, sl.weekKey, sl.status, sl.sentDate, sl.sentAt, sl.itemCount, sl.dryRun, sl.error
FROM userEmailSendLog sl
JOIN users u ON u.id = sl.userId
WHERE sl.digestType = 'thursday'
  AND sl.weekKey >= '2026W19'
ORDER BY sl.weekKey DESC, u.name;
